degraded_policy.spawn: When collaboration spawn tools are absent, run distinct labelled inline worker and reviewer phases; never invent worker/explorer agent types as the only option.
degraded_policy.wait: Without wait tools, collect results only through the same-turn inline path.
degraded_policy.message: Without message tools, keep coordination in the main thread.
degraded_policy.follow_up: Without follow-up tools, issue the next brief as a new inline phase.
degraded_policy.interrupt: Without interrupt tools, do not claim cancellation of a child agent.
degraded_policy.list: Without list tools, track child ids only in Hyperflow artefacts.
degraded_policy.structured_question: Render the exact Hyperflow Question chat block, persist a safe checkpoint if needed, and end the turn.
degraded_policy.skill_continuation: Load the target skills/<name>/SKILL.md completely and continue inline; never stop with Skill tool unavailable.
degraded_policy.edit: Use the first available file edit tool; refuse to invent paths.
degraded_policy.shell: Use the first available shell tool within the security blocklist.
degraded_policy.web_research: Skip network research when no web tool is present; record unavailable.
degraded_policy.usage_metrics: Report unavailable; never fabricate tokens or ratios.

degraded_policy.spawn: When Agent is unavailable, run distinct labelled inline worker and reviewer phases.
degraded_policy.wait: Agent returns in-session; no separate wait tool required.
degraded_policy.message: Coordinate in the main thread when mailbox tools are absent.
degraded_policy.follow_up: Issue the next brief as a new Agent call or inline phase.
degraded_policy.interrupt: Do not claim child cancellation without an interrupt tool.
degraded_policy.list: Track children only in Hyperflow artefacts when list is absent.
degraded_policy.structured_question: Render Hyperflow Question chat block and end the turn.
degraded_policy.skill_continuation: Load the target SKILL.md completely and continue inline.
degraded_policy.edit: Use Edit or Write when present.
degraded_policy.shell: Use Bash within the security blocklist.
degraded_policy.web_research: Skip when WebSearch/WebFetch are absent; record unavailable.
degraded_policy.background: Foreground-only when background Agent mode is unavailable.
degraded_policy.usage_metrics: Report unavailable; never fabricate tokens or ratios.
